title: 'My son was so happy': Hours after saying 'I do', Indian-origin newlywed pilot killed in helicopter crash in US
summary_full: An Indian-origin pilot, Dave Fiji, tragically died in a helicopter crash just hours after his wedding in Georgia. The crash also claimed the life of the helicopter pilot, while his new bride, Jesni, survived and is recovering. Dave had expressed concerns about poor visibility before the flight, which was a special send-off after the ceremony.
